correctness.justification: Nearly every file/line citation verifies; slips include the 'avoid abbreviations' rule attributed to CLAUDE.md (actually phrased as 'Meaningful naming - Use descriptive names') and header.tsx:36 cited for a p/a/b map param when that line has no such variable.

coverage.justification: Captures the high-impact misleads (ReportView, /api/incr, PostPage, gutter/Page, nav.link vs href, interests/Currently, _data.ts) plus the abbreviation cluster and minor single-letter params with few meaningful gaps.

prioritization.justification: Critical bucket correctly centers name/behavior mismatches and a user-visible URL; the 'Top 3' ordering is defensible and the severity tiers reflect real impact.

actionability.justification: Every finding has a concrete replacement name and specific target location, and the suggestions are safe to mechanically apply.

rationale.justification: Critical and High items have crisp why-it-matters explanations (domain term, convention, reader expectation); some Medium/Minor entries are terser but still defensible.

signal_density.justification: Compact structure with no filler — each bullet carries a location, a problem, and a fix in a single line.

fabrications: 'avoid abbreviations' rule in CLAUDE.md — the file says 'Meaningful naming - Use descriptive names', not a literal abbreviation rule
header.tsx:36 cited for p/a/b single-letter map params — that line is `if (project.tags && ...)`, with no single-letter variable and no sort/filter
overall_notes: A tight, well-prioritized audit that correctly flags the most misleading name (ReportView returning null while implying UI) and the user-visible /api/incr. Citations are accurate with only two minor slips, and every suggestion ships with a concrete rename. Strong rationale on critical items, slightly thin on the minor tier.
